heading: Your command centre for asset intelligence
description: In-house software customised for each client — designed with consumer need analysis to deliver practical tracking, visibility, and control from one dashboard.
dashboard_image_alt: Footprints asset tracking dashboard by Tag Robo Tech

features.title: Item visibility & tracking
features.description: You can view geo location where asset was last traced.

features.title: Auto reconciliation
features.description: Reconciliation can be done between book data and physical count.

features.title: Physical condition monitoring
features.description: Not working assets can be identified.

features.title: Incident management
features.description: Log of past breakdown can be retrieved including repair details.

features.title: Location mapping
features.description: Current location of item can be traced.

features.title: Manual retrieval
features.description: If you wish to retrieve any data point such as machine manual, this can be done very conveniently.
